notes: Intermediary JWT decoded: `{alg:EdDSA, iss:textql, email:<user>, iat:<now>, exp:<iat+~15min>}`. It is NOT a session cookie — it only unlocks the org selection step.
Fired from https://app.textql.com/auth/oauth/google/callback right after HandleGoogleOAuthCallback returns.

Response body not captured this probe — expected to return the user's email + the list of orgs they can select, but the actual list comes from a separate ListOrganizations call on the /org-selection page.
